name: Moose Landrieu
subtitle: owner-operator · Lacombe Service Garage · thirty-one years

ultimate_ability.label: The Backup Generator
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Start the shop's backup generator: gain +2 time this turn (a burst of stamina beyond your normal rhythm), and START ENGINE's cost drops to 1 for the turn.

notes: Moose's hand for the Chariot arcana at lacombe_service_garage (the old_lacombe scenario). Kept as tbd_chariot · the primary Chariot hand is Antonio at ember_ash_office (attorney); Moose is the alt-hand for the garage scenario. FATIGUE is the second stat.
